description:
What You’ll Do
-        Responsible for design, development, implementation and unit testing of software.
-        Debug and troubleshoot issues in the application.
-        Write clean, maintainable and efficient code for both frontend and backend systems.
Knowledge, Skills, Ability
-        Basic understanding of frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS,  JavaScript, React/Vue/Svelte).
-        Basic understanding of frontend libraries like Svelte/Vue.
-        Familiarity with modern UI/UX best practices.
-        Knowledge of backend development using Node.js.
-        Familiarity with databases such as MongoDB (preferred) or MSSQL.
-        Understanding of RESTful APIs and how to integrate them.
-        Knowledge of version control systems like Git.
-        Strong problem-solving skills and a willingness to learn.
-        (Optional) Basic understanding of cloud platforms like AWS (preferred) or Azure.
-        (Optional) Basic experience in Python/PyTorch.
Education and Qualifications
-        Candidate must possess at least Diploma/Advanced/Higher/Graduate Diploma in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering or any equivalent field.
-        At least 1 year of working experience in the related field.
-        Fresh graduates are strongly encouraged to apply.
